expected.notes: Student received foreign gifts and is_nra derives to 'no' (stem_opt with 7 years means substantial presence test passed), satisfying both conditions to fire foreign_gifts_3520_risk.

probe_intent:

  - answers.received_foreign_gifts eq yes
  - answers.is_nra neq yes
